Title: Automated Requirement Notifications
Description: Automatically notify all users via email and in-app notifications whenever admin publishes a requirement.

Title: Global Admin Auto-Follow
Description: Ensures all new users follow CrewCanvas Official upon registration to populate their feed.

Title: Retroactive Community Sync
Description: Added a manual sync button to make existing users follow the admin account.

Title: Enhanced Email Content
Description: Updated requirement emails to include the full text of the admin post instead of a preview.

Title: Multi-Auth System
Description: Seamless integration for Google OAuth2 and Email/Password login.

Title: Role-Based Access Control
Description: Implementation of RBAC to distinguish between Admin/Crew/Client roles.

Title: Multi-Language Support
Description: Global Translation Engine for English/Hindi/Telugu support.
